implementation_drift.description: Noted explicitly in 07 that 'reaction-diffusion' with hyphen is not substring of 'reaction diffusion' without hyphen — this affects the mdpi Learning Reaction Diffusion paper's overlap count.

overexcitement.description: Liesegang banding feels elegant as a predictive mechanism for capability emergence. Tempting framing but Turing-instability-on-NN + emergence quantification + emergent abilities surveys already cover the conceptual space at the umbrella level.

honest_note: Liesegang specifically is fresh; Turing-pattern-on-NN with reaction-diffusion mechanism is already done (ResearchGate 271621329). Emergent abilities umbrella has multiple 2024-2026 surveys. The specific Jablczynski-law-spacing prediction would be novel as a particular sub-claim, but the broader 'capability emergence as a self-organizing pattern formation process' frame is occupied.
